_doc: 验证门(verify_citations.py)回归 gold set。label=real 的应落 confirmed(或最差 review, 绝不 rejected); label=fake 的必须 rejected(绝不 confirmed)。不变量: confirmed 中 0 个 fake, rejected 中 0 个 real。fake 条目为合成的、看似合理但不存在的标题, 不指向任何真实作者作品。

real.title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale
BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization
U-Net: Convolutional Networks for Biomedical Image Segmentation

fake.title: Quantum Holographic Transformers for Telepathic Image Synthesis
Self-Supervised Chrono-Diffusion Networks for Retrocausal Video Prediction
HyperGraph Capsule Manifolds for Zero-Shot Olfactory Recognition
Federated Spiking Wavelet Attention for Subdermal Biometric Forgery Detection
Neural Tensor Origami: Foldable Latent Spaces for Tactile Style Transfer
